name: TensorPM v1.11.1-beta.2 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.11.1-beta.2

## 🏗️ Improvements

### Smoother onboarding project generation

The final step of onboarding — turning your answers into your first project —
now transitions more reliably.

**What changed:**

- ✅ Fixed a timing race that could leave the project-generation loader on
  screen after the project was already created
- ✅ The "your project is ready" hand-off now waits for both the generation and
  your dreaming-level choice, whichever finishes last
- ✅ Cleaner layout while the project is being generated

**User Benefit:**
Onboarding reaches your finished project without getting visually stuck on the
loading screen.

## 📝 Notes

- Internal: added end-to-end coverage for the proxy-backed onboarding AI flow
  (onboarding without your own AI key) and a test-only proxy URL override so the
  flow can be exercised against a locally seeded proxy.

---

## 📅 Release Info

- **Version**: 1.11.1-beta.2
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-18
- **Previous Version**: 1.11.1-beta.1
- **Type**: Patch Release (Beta)
